messages.content: I need a user login feature with email and password, return a token on success

plan.description: Create user authentication model with email and password fields, including password hashing using bcrypt or similar secure algorithm

interface.name: createUserModel
interface.description: Creates and returns a User model with email and password fields, including password hashing using bcrypt

plan.description: Implement email format validation utility function that checks for valid email patterns before authentication attempts

interface.name: validateEmailFormat
interface.description: Validates email format against standard email patterns

plan.description: Create login form component with email and password input fields and submit button

interface.name: LoginForm
interface.description: Creates a login form component with email and password input fields and submit button

plan.description: Implement authentication service that handles email/password verification against stored hashes

interface.name: login
interface.description: Authenticates user credentials and generates JWT token if valid

plan.description: Create JWT token generation utility with configurable expiration time and secure signing

interface.name: loginEndpoint
interface.description: API endpoint that receives email/password, calls auth service, and returns token or error

plan.description: Implement login API endpoint that processes email/password submissions and returns JWT token or error messages

interface.name: handleLoginSubmit
interface.description: Connects login form to API endpoint with proper error handling for invalid credentials

plan.description: Add failed login attempt logging system that records timestamps, IP addresses, and email attempts

interface.name: generateToken
interface.description: Generates JWT token with user identification payload and secure signing

plan.description: Integrate error handling for invalid credentials with appropriate user-friendly error messages

interface.name: handleAuthError
interface.description: Handles different authentication failure scenarios with appropriate error messages and status codes

plan.description: Create comprehensive tests for authentication flow including success cases, invalid emails, wrong passwords, and JWT validation

interface.name: createAuthFlowTests
interface.description: Creates comprehensive tests for authentication flow including success cases, invalid emails, wrong passwords, and JWT validation. The function sets up test suites with various scenarios to ensure robust authentication functionality.

requirements.title: User Authentication with Email and Password
requirements.description: Implement a login system that allows users to authenticate using their email address and password, returning an authentication token upon successful verification.
acceptance_criteria: User can submit email and password through login form
System validates email format before authentication attempt
System verifies password matches stored hash for provided email
System returns a secure authentication token upon successful login
System returns appropriate error message for invalid credentials
Authentication token is JWT format with expiration time
Failed login attempts are logged for security monitoring

progress_text: 当前进度：接口定义已补全，等待确认执行。
